race.comment: PRINCESS PAINTON (11) turned in a decent effort last start to finish second over 1732m at Sale after a good first-up run. Looks primed now after two runs back and gets the added bonus of barrier one, which will help her find a prominent spot without doing too much work. DUKE OF CLARENCE (1) is also fitter for two runs back and has formlines that marry up with PRINCESS PAINTON through Somethingsostrong, but he's drawn the other side of the track, which could be the difference. SONIC BENDER (7) has not raced since his debut back on December 26 when he finished fifth over 1350m at Newcastle and jumps sharply in trip but will find this easier and is has the Waller polish. NOTHIN' WONG HERE (3) was in the market in town first-up, ran well, and can springboard here.
